FG Breaks Ground On 12MW Solar Mini‐grid In Rivers, Targeting 13,492 Homes, Businesses
results.description: The federal government has begun construction of four solar hybrid mini‐grids in Rivers State which it said will supply electricity to more than 13,492 households, businesses and public institutions, officials said on Friday. The projects, with a combined capacity of 11.9MWp, are being implemented by the Rural Electrification Agency (REA) under the Distributed Access through [...]
